title: SPELCom_Event Statement
parameters:
eventNumber	An integer expression whose value is from 1000 - 32767.

msgArg1, msgArg2, msgArg3...	Optional. Each message argument can be either a number, string literal, or a variable name.
description: This instruction makes it easy to send real time information to an application from a Spel task running in the controller. For example, you can update parts count, lot number, etc. by sending an event.
